description: lid see ihii they are preparing a lali for ill ir own backs li is true when they feel it and they deserve to feel it ilu y may console themselves with the idea that it is a whip of their own man ufacture Loud cheeig At last we arrive at the programme of the slave power in its open and un disguised forms of which Mr Breckin ridge is the representative ami Mr Douglas the servant although lie does not wear its livery except on occasions of state This programme is as follows The agitation of the slavery question North mid South is to be arrested the fugi tive slave law in its present form is to be strictly carried out and State legis lation impeding its execution to be re pealed the constitutional right of sla very to occupy the Territories of the United States and to he protected there is to be acknowledged all measures tending to impede the ingress of slavery aud its establishment in the Territories are to be abandoned the opposition to the conquest and annexation of foreign countries out of which more slave states can be formed is to be given up the
